posting.locationSummary: Local Union #2 jurisdiction in Northern and Central New York; applications accepted in Liverpool, NY
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at the Liverpool, NY office during the recruitment period, apply online at baclocal2nyvt.org, or mail completed applications to the JATC by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Ogdensburg), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JATC #2 (Ogdensburg), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationHours: Mondays through Fridays from 8:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must have lived within Local Union #2's geographic jurisdiction for at least six months before applying. Eligible counties include Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes, and a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must be physically able to lift 50-100 lbs.
Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must have a valid driver's license to operate company vehicles.
Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months prior to application.

Eligible counties include Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Essex, Franklin, Fulton, Greene, Hamilton, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Montgomery, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, Rensselaer, St. Lawrence, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, and Washington.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, physically able to lift 50-100 lbs, have reliable transportation and a valid driver's license, and have lived in the Local #2 jurisdiction for at least six months.
